Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTMxMzE4LCJleHAiOjE3NzQxMzYxMTh9._hohbO8lm9tFwu_ntIj4ujms2dm9omRK-zXq6UUJQ_g"

echo "=== GET /profile ==="
curl -s http://localhost/api/profile -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"

echo -e "\\n\\n=== PUT /profile \(lose fat, 40/30/30, lbs\) ==="
curl -s -X PUT http://localhost/api/profile \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \\
  -d '{"goal":"lose fat","goal_pace":"moderate","protein_pct":40,"carbs_pct":30,"fat_pct":30,"weight_unit":"lbs","height_unit":"cm","activity_level":"moderately active","sex":"male","height_cm":178}' 

echo -e "\\n\\n=== GET /profile after save ==="
curl -s http://localhost/api/profile -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN")

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTMxMzE4LCJleHAiOjE3NzQxMzYxMTh9._hohbO8lm9tFwu_ntIj4ujms2dm9omRK-zXq6UUJQ_g"

echo "=== POST /recipes/23/reparse-steps ==="
curl -s -X POST http://localhost/api/recipes/23/reparse-steps \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
steps = d.get\('steps',[]\)
print\(f'{len\(steps\)} steps reparsed'\)
for s in steps:
    refs = s.get\('ingredient_refs', []\)
    if refs:
        print\(f'  Step {s[\\"position\\"]}: {[{\\"name\\":r[\\"name\\"],\\"qty\\":r[\\"quantity\\"],\\"unit\\":r[\\"unit\\"]} for r in refs]}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  Step {s[\\"position\\"]}: no refs detected'\)
")

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTMxMzE4LCJleHAiOjE3NzQxMzYxMTh9._hohbO8lm9tFwu_ntIj4ujms2dm9omRK-zXq6UUJQ_g"

docker compose exec db psql -U mealplanner -d mealplanner -c "\\d meal_plans" 2>&1

docker compose exec db psql -U mealplanner -d mealplanner -c "SELECT date, meal_type, recipe_id, servings FROM meal_plans WHERE user_id=1 ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTMxMzE4LCJleHAiOjE3NzQxMzYxMTh9._hohbO8lm9tFwu_ntIj4ujms2dm9omRK-zXq6UUJQ_g"

echo "=== GET /shopping-list?weekStart=2026-03-09 ==="
curl -s "http://localhost/api/shopping-list?weekStart=2026-03-09" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('meals:', len\(d.get\('meals',[]\)\)\)
print\('ingredients:', len\(d.get\('ingredients',[]\)\)\)
for m in d.get\('meals',[]\):
    print\(f'  meal: {m[\\"day\\"]} {m[\\"meal_type\\"]} - {m[\\"meal_name\\"]}'\)
for i in d.get\('ingredients',[]\)[:5]:
    print\(f'  ing: {i.get\(\\"totalQuantity\\",\\"?\\"\)} {i.get\(\\"unit\\",\\"\\"\)} {i.get\(\\"name\\"\)}'\)
")
